intro: Three men. One dream. Your choice. When love begins in a dream… A visual novel where dreams and reality collide, and every choice you make changes everything.
description:
After the worst breakup of your life, you stumble upon your ex's old phone. That night, you launch a mysterious app called "Dream Connecting", and suddenly find yourself pulled into a world of lucid dreams. In the middle of that dream, the ground splits apart. Through the crumbling world, a man appears. Should you save him, trapped inside the dream, or answer the feelings of those waiting for you in reality? The man who loves you. The man you love. And the one you can only meet in dreams… Three fates. All in your hands.

・Multiple endings that change with every choice, your love story, your way!
・Easy-to-play chat-style visual novel format. feel the butterflies of real love!
・Heart-pounding cutscene direction and immersive visual novel presentation!
・Hidden secret stories tucked inside every chapter, can you find them all?
・An achievement system that keeps you coming back for more!
・Beautiful illustrations and a sweeping, emotional soundtrack!

Whether you love otome games, story-driven adventures, or stunning art with a love story that makes your heart race, Because It's a Dream, It Must Be Romance was made just for you. Your special love story, set in a world between dreams and reality, starts right now.

Prologue
After the worst breakup of your life, you accidentally end up with your ex's unfamiliar phone.
That night, the moment you launch the mysterious app "Dream Connecting" installed on the phone, you're pulled into the world of lucid dreams.
A sudden earthquake strikes inside the dream. Through a world shattering to pieces, a man appears. Should you save him, trapped in the dream, or answer the people watching over you in reality?
The man who loves you. The man you love. And the one you can only meet in dreams…
The fate of all three rests in your hands.
